tracks.meaning: the main stem of a tree, typically the woody axis that grows upward from the roots
a large box or chest, typically used for storing or transporting clothes, luggage, or other items
a large compartment at the rear of a motor vehicle used for storing luggage or cargo
a flexible tube or conduit used to direct air or exhaust in ships or aircraft
a telephone line or channel used for transmitting multiple signals simultaneously
a person's body or physique, especially when considered in relation to clothing or appearance
to confine or enclose something within a limited space or container
